title: Greek Garlic Chicken Wrap
description: A flavorful and healthy Greek-inspired wrap filled with garlic chicken, tender greens, and crispy pretzels.
instructions: Season chicken breast with salt, pepper, and garlic.
Grill chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
In a small bowl, whisk together Greek yogurt and minced garlic.
In a large bowl, combine chopped lettuce, diced tomato, crumbled feta cheese, and crushed pretzels.
Slice grilled chicken and add to bowl with yogurt sauce.
Stir to combine and serve in a wrap or on a plate.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve immediately.
